dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The initial rules-context-loader step failed with a 504 Gateway Timeout, preventing direct verification of rule alignment. Subsequent steps proceeded, implying partial adherence, but the failure limits confidence in full governance compliance.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map and alignment-engine steps completed successfully and passed schema validation. This indicates that causal mappings and architectural relationships were sufficiently processed to generate valid outputs despite the initial context loading failure.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine and architecture-intent-generator steps executed without error, suggesting that trade-offs and architectural tensions were identified and addressed. However, the missing initial context may have constrained the depth of tension resolution.
